title: HORROR - Fake Join/Leave Messages
description: Every 10-20 minutes, a random fake join/leave message will be sent to chat
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, join the discord server

------------------------------------

Every 10-20 minutes, a fake join/leave message using either one of the players' usernames or obfuscated text will be sent to chat. This mod is perfect for enhancing the horror aspect of your world, or simply confusing your friends!

This mod will work with any number of players, but will only choose the usernames of the first 3 players who join the world if there are more than 3 players in the game.

Check the gallery for an example
